source_string: 100+ new & better translations for Minecraft Bedrock! By Azurite & its Community
translation: poki ni li pana e toki mute e ante pona tawa pana Bedrock! jan Azurite en kulupu li pali e ni

context: Name of the to be translated language

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
translation: o kama jo e palisa jelo
o pali e ilo pakala sin pona
ni li sike seli sina anu seme?

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
translation: o moli e monsuta Ghast kepeken sike seli
sina wile e ijo ale la o kepeken "@e"
sina wile e jan ale la o kepeken "@a"
sina wile e jan poka la o kepeken "@p"

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: sina wile e ni la, o kama jan sewi

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: ma kulupu ni li kepeken ala ilo pi toki wawa
sina wile e jan wan pi nasin ala la o kepeken "@r"
sina wile e ijo pi pali ni la o kepeken "@s"

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: o sona e ni! sina sitelen e nimi sina lon lipu la, sina ken ala ante e ona.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
translation: sina ken ala pali lon sewi %s
mi ken ala pana e toki sina

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: sina wile ala wile open e lipu ni?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: sina wile open e lipu ni anu sina wile poki e nasin tawa ona?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: o sona e pona pi jan pana a!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: nimi IP ni anu jan ni li lon ala

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
translation: ijo pi lukin moli pi nimi %s la nanpa sewi ona li %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: ijo pi lukin moli pi nimi %s la jan ala li lon

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
translation: ijo pi lukin moli pi nimi %s la nanpa ona li %s
alasa pi sona nanpa li open

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: mi ante e ala. jan ni li jan lawa ala
mi ante e nasin musi pi jan %s tawa %s

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: %s li lon poka sina la ona li lon ma %s (suli weka li %s)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: mi ante e ala. awen la jan ni li jan lawa
mi ken ala lawa e musi pi jan poka

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.

translation: mi wile ala awen e musi lon tenpo ale
mi wile awen e musi lon tenpo ale

source_string: There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: mi ken ala pali e ni
nanpa pi ma open li kama %s, %s, %s [%s] lon ma %s tawa %s
mi ken ala kama e ni

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: ijo ni li jo e nimi lili ni anu nimi lili mute
%s la nimi lili ala li lon

source_string: Target does not have this tag
translation: ijo ni li jo ala e nimi lili ni
ma kulupu li kama sona e nimi sina...
mi kama jo e sona nanpa...

source_string: Failed to connect to the server

translation: %s li ken ala open tan awen!
kama pona ilo en weka wawa
o sewi e len e ilo
suli sewi pi anpa pi nasin ma
o tawa e nasin pi nasin ma
o suli e nasin pi nasin ma
ni li ante e ante pona sina.
sina ken ala weka e ante ni.
suli pi nanpa pi lon ma
tenpo kasi pi sitelen kalama lupa
nanpa pi tomo pi anpa ma
nanpa pi telo seli lon ma
ken selo anpa pi suli pi nena suli
ante wawa (jan pi sona mute taso!)
ante wawa namako (jan pi sona mute taso!)

ilo ante pi ma supa suli

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: ante la, mi pali e ni lon tenpo pini!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: sina wile pana e ma sama ni tawa jan ante la, o kepeken lipu lon anpa!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: supa pona li anpa lon %1$s li moli e ona
%2$s li moli e %1$s kepeken ilo alasa
%2$s li moli e %1$s kepeken ilo alasa %3$s

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s li tawa weka %2$s li moli tan kasi kipisi
%1$s li tawa weka %2$s li moli tan telo

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: leko li anpa lon %1$s li moli e ona
%2$s li moli e %1$s kepeken sike seli
%2$s li moli e %1$s kepeken sike seli tan %3$s
%1$s li utala e %2$s li moli seli

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s li wile weka tan %2$s li moli lon telo seli

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s li utala e %2$s li moli seli
%1$s li wile pakala e %2$s li moli
%1$s li moli tan ilo alasa telo tan %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s li moli lupa tan palisa kiwen tan sewi
%1$s li moli lupa tan palisa kiwen
%1$s li tawa anpa tan nasin palisa sewi
%1$s li tawa anpa tan kasi linja

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %2$s li anpa e %1$s kepeken %3$s tawa moli

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s li tawa anpa li kama moli tan %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s li tawa anpa li kama moli tan %2$s kepeken %3$s
jan li anpa e %1$s tawa moli

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: tenpo suno 5 musi la sina ken musi lon ma ni!
tenpo suno wan taso li lon!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: tenpo sina li pini. sina wile sitelen e pali sina la, o kepeken %s.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: tenpo suno 5 musi (1h40m) la, sina ken musi lon ma ni. musi pona!
sina ken lukin e jo sina kepeken %1$s

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: o lukin kepeken ilo luka. %1$s en %2$s en %3$s en %4$s la sina ken tawa
o lukin kepeken ilo luka (ona li lukin sama soweli lili)
%1$s en %2$s en %3$s en %4$s la sina ken tawa
musi Manka pi wile ala mani

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: tenpo sina li pini, sina ken pana e mani tawa awen musi, anu sina ken pali e ma sin!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: sina wile ala wile awen e ike ma? tenpo ale la ona li %1$s. awen la sina ken ala ante e ni!
o pini e ante pi ike ma
pali jan la mi ken ala toki tawa kulupu
ma kulupu li weka e sina

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: musi sina li ike. o open sin e musi sina e ilo sina pi open musi.

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: tenpo ni la ma kulupu li ken ala kama jo e nimi sina. o kama sin lon tenpo kama.
mi ken ala toki tawa kulupu
poki tenpo pi ilo sona li pini
jan li weka e sina tan ni: sina toki e mute jaki

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: sina wile ala wile weka e ma kulupu ni?

source_string: Prefix, %s%2$s again %s and %1$s lastly %s and also %1$s again!
translation: ijo monsi, sin la %s%2$s en %s en %1$s. pini la %s en %1$s lon tenpo sin tu!

source_string: You've been playing for greater than 24 hours
translation: sike suno wa li pini la sina awen musi

source_string: Excessive gaming may interfere with normal daily life
translation: musi pi tenpo suli li ken ike e ali sina
o lukin ala e nimi IP
mi o alasa e wile sina

source_string: The default Minecraft graphics, now updated with stylish new textures!
translation: musi li lukin ante ala li kalama ante ala
mi pali e sijelo sin sina...
